- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.20`
- Patched version: `2026.4.20`

## Impact

Browser profile creation normalized `cdpUrl` values before persisting them, but did not apply the configured browser SSRF policy at creation time. In deployments that explicitly disabled private-network CDP targets, a stored profile could still point at a private-network or metadata endpoint and later be probed by normal profile status flows.

Default trusted-operator browser behavior allows private-network CDP endpoints, so this only affected strict-mode deployments. Severity is low.

## Fix

OpenClaw now checks CDP endpoints against the browser SSRF policy during profile creation and reachability operations.

Fix commits:

- `1fd049e3074cac72f6734a7fe88468c84f5f8bd7`
- `e90c89cf8b1459f2aa1f3a665be67392b6c03fdf`

## Release

Fixed in OpenClaw `2026.4.20`.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j4c5-89f5-f3pm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-25T23:49:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j4c5-89f5-f3pm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j4c5-89f5-f3pm"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-25T23:49:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-j4c5-89f5-f3pm", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/1fd049e3074cac72f6734a7fe88468c84f5f8bd7", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/e90c89cf8b1459f2aa1f3a665be67392b6c03fdf", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j4c5-89f5-f3pm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-j4c5-89f5-f3pm", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Browser CDP profile creation skipped strict-mode SSRF checks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-25T23:49:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j4c5-89f5-f3pm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Browser CDP profile creation skipped strict-mode SSRF checks
